chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 1129 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For orders on MA 13828/15 3. For Katcha Peshi 4. For orders on MA 13829/15 Mr. Zeeshan Ali Burdi, Advocate for petitioner Ch. Bashir Ahmed Asstt. A.G. Learned A.A.G. has filed comments on behalf of respondent Nos. 3 and 4 which are taken on record. Case of the petitioners is that they are being harassed by the private respondents on account of their marriage which they contracted against the wish of their relatives. Respondent No.5 who is father of petitioner No.2 is present and states that he does not intend to take any action against the petitioners. This statement has satisfied the counsel for petitioners who seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms. This petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE *Karar/-
